title: Liz Taylor
compiled_truth: Liz Taylor is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-02-07), Liz Taylor sent 402 and received 624 emails, totalling 1026 interactions. Top correspondents: [John Lavorato](people/john-lavorato) (63), [Mike McConnell](people/mike-mcconnell) (57), [Jeffrey Mcmahon](people/jeffrey-mcmahon) (57), [Cathy Phillips](people/cathy-phillips) (55), [Louise Kitchen](people/louise-kitchen) (51). Mailbox folders observed: _americas, _sent_mail, calendar, contacts, deleted_items, discussion_threads.
